creator: eogren@earthlink.net
text:
The PPP Primer was fairly out of date; the DNS examples referenced bind
4.x, the -alias option was used instead of NAT, as well as various other
minor things that needed to be updated.
  In addition, there was a lot of weird capitalization, and very little
DocBook tags (I assume because this was DocBook'ized before the FBSD
extensions).
 Also did a very minor reorg.

How-To-Repeat: 
  Read the PPP Primer.
